title: ResponseEnvelope
description: Common response envelope returned by every Quote Garden v3 endpoint.

message.description: Short human-readable label describing the response.

pagination.description: Pagination block. Values may be null on non-paginated endpoints (e.g., /genres, /authors).

totalQuotes.description: Total quote count matched by the request (null when not applicable).

data.description: Array of resource records or strings (depending on the endpoint).
